originContent: Fast speech recognition with NVIDIA's [Parakeet](https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/parakeet) models in pure C++.
translatedContent: Fast speech recognition with NVIDIA's [Parakeet](https://huggingface.co/collections/nvidia/parakeet) models in pure C++.

originContent: Built on [axiom](https://github.com/frikallo/axiom) — a lightweight tensor library with automatic Metal GPU acceleration. No ONNX runtime, no Python runtime, no heavyweight dependencies. Just C++ and one tensor library that outruns PyTorch MPS.
translatedContent: Built on [axiom](https://github.com/frikallo/axiom) — a lightweight tensor library with automatic Metal GPU acceleration. No ONNX runtime, no Python runtime, no heavyweight dependencies. Just C++ and one tensor library that outruns PyTorch MPS.

originContent: **~27ms encoder inference on Apple Silicon GPU** for 10s audio (110M model) — 96x faster than CPU. FP16 support for ~2x memory reduction.
translatedContent: **~27ms encoder inference on Apple Silicon GPU** for 10s audio (110M model) — 96x faster than CPU. FP16 support for ~2x memory reduction.

originContent: | `tdt-ctc-110m` | `ParakeetTDTCTC` | 110M | Offline | English, dual CTC/TDT decoder heads |
translatedContent: | `tdt-ctc-110m` | `ParakeetTDTCTC` | 110M | Offline | English, dual CTC/TDT decoder heads |

originContent: | `eou-120m` | `ParakeetEOU` | 120M | Streaming | English, RNNT with end-of-utterance detection |
translatedContent: | `eou-120m` | `ParakeetEOU` | 120M | Streaming | English, RNNT with end-of-utterance detection |

originContent: All ASR models share the same audio pipeline: 16kHz mono WAV → 80-bin Mel spectrogram → FastConformer encoder.
translatedContent: All ASR models share the same audio pipeline: 16kHz mono WAV → 80-bin Mel spectrogram → FastConformer encoder.

originContent: t.to_half();  // optional — FP16 inference (~2x memory reduction)
translatedContent: t.to_half();  // optional — FP16 inference (~2x memory reduction)

originContent: - **Multiple decoders** — CTC greedy, TDT greedy, CTC beam search, TDT beam search (switch at call site)
translatedContent: - **Multiple decoders** — CTC greedy, TDT greedy, CTC beam search, TDT beam search (switch at call site)

originContent: - **Word timestamps** — Per-word start/end times and confidence scores on all decoders
translatedContent: - **Word timestamps** — Per-word start/end times and confidence scores on all decoders

originContent: - **Beam search + LM** — CTC and TDT beam search with optional ARPA n-gram language model fusion
translatedContent: - **Beam search + LM** — CTC and TDT beam search with optional ARPA n-gram language model fusion

originContent: - **Phrase boosting** — Context biasing via token-level trie for domain-specific vocabulary
translatedContent: - **Phrase boosting** — Context biasing via token-level trie for domain-specific vocabulary

originContent: - **Batch transcription** — Multiple files in one batched encoder forward pass
translatedContent: - **Batch transcription** — Multiple files in one batched encoder forward pass

originContent: - **VAD preprocessing** — Silero VAD strips silence before ASR; timestamps auto-remapped
translatedContent: - **VAD preprocessing** — Silero VAD strips silence before ASR; timestamps auto-remapped

originContent: - **GPU acceleration** — Metal via axiom's MPSGraph compiler (96x speedup on Apple Silicon)
translatedContent: - **GPU acceleration** — Metal via axiom's MPSGraph compiler (96x speedup on Apple Silicon)

originContent: - **FP16 inference** — Half-precision weights and compute (~2x memory reduction)
translatedContent: - **FP16 inference** — Half-precision weights and compute (~2x memory reduction)

originContent: - **Streaming** — EOU and Nemotron models with chunked audio input
translatedContent: - **Streaming** — EOU and Nemotron models with chunked audio input

originContent: - **Speaker diarization** — Sortformer (up to 4 speakers), combinable with ASR for speaker-attributed words
translatedContent: - **Speaker diarization** — Sortformer (up to 4 speakers), combinable with ASR for speaker-attributed words

originContent: - **C API** — Flat `extern "C"` FFI for Python, Swift, Go, Rust, and other languages
translatedContent: - **C API** — Flat `extern "C"` FFI for Python, Swift, Go, Rust, and other languages

originContent: - **Multi-format audio** — WAV, FLAC, MP3, OGG with automatic resampling
translatedContent: - **Multi-format audio** — WAV, FLAC, MP3, OGG with automatic resampling

originContent: See [examples/](examples/) for code demonstrating each feature.
translatedContent: See [examples/](examples/) for code demonstrating each feature.

originContent: Prebuilt binaries are attached to each [GitHub release](https://github.com/Frikallo/parakeet.cpp/releases) for macOS arm64, macOS x86_64, and Linux x86_64. Download the tarball for your platform and extract:
translatedContent: Prebuilt binaries are attached to each [GitHub release](https://github.com/Frikallo/parakeet.cpp/releases) for macOS arm64, macOS x86_64, and Linux x86_64. Download the tarball for your platform and extract:

originContent: # On macOS, clear the Gatekeeper quarantine attribute first:
translatedContent: # On macOS, clear the Gatekeeper quarantine attribute first:

originContent: The archive ships a self-contained `bin/parakeet` (and `bin/example-server`) plus `lib/libaxiom` with `@rpath`/`$ORIGIN` set so the binaries resolve their dependencies relative to the install dir — drop the directory anywhere. The C-API headers under `include/parakeet/` are included for embedders.
translatedContent: The archive ships a self-contained `bin/parakeet` (and `bin/example-server`) plus `lib/libaxiom` with `@rpath`/`$ORIGIN` set so the binaries resolve their dependencies relative to the install dir — drop the directory anywhere. The C-API headers under `include/parakeet/` are included for embedders.

originContent: Requirements: C++20 (Clang 14+ or GCC 12+), CMake 3.20+, macOS 13+ for Metal GPU.
translatedContent: Requirements: C++20 (Clang 14+ or GCC 12+), CMake 3.20+, macOS 13+ for Metal GPU.

originContent: > **macOS:** building requires the **full Xcode** install (not just Command Line Tools), because axiom compiles its Metal shaders with `xcrun metal` and `xcrun metallib` — those ship only with Xcode. If you just want to run parakeet, use the prebuilt tarball above; the `.metallib` is embedded into the shipped `libaxiom.dylib` and runs without any Xcode/CLT install on the user side.
translatedContent: > **macOS:** building requires the **full Xcode** install (not just Command Line Tools), because axiom compiles its Metal shaders with `xcrun metal` and `xcrun metallib` — those ship only with Xcode. If you just want to run parakeet, use the prebuilt tarball above; the `.metallib` is embedded into the shipped `libaxiom.dylib` and runs without any Xcode/CLT install on the user side.

originContent: The converter supports all model types: `110m-tdt-ctc` (default), `600m-tdt`, `eou-120m`, `nemotron-600m`, `sortformer`.
translatedContent: The converter supports all model types: `110m-tdt-ctc` (default), `600m-tdt`, `eou-120m`, `nemotron-600m`, `sortformer`.

originContent: | [beam-search](examples/beam-search/) | CTC/TDT beam search with optional ARPA LM |
translatedContent: | [beam-search](examples/beam-search/) | CTC/TDT beam search with optional ARPA LM |

originContent: | [gpu](examples/gpu/) | Metal GPU + FP16 with timing comparison |
translatedContent: | [gpu](examples/gpu/) | Metal GPU + FP16 with timing comparison |

originContent: Built on a shared FastConformer encoder (Conv2d 8x subsampling → N Conformer blocks with relative positional attention):
translatedContent: Built on a shared FastConformer encoder (Conv2d 8x subsampling → N Conformer blocks with relative positional attention):

originContent: | CTC | `ParakeetCTC` | Greedy argmax or beam search (+LM) | Fast, English-only |
translatedContent: | CTC | `ParakeetCTC` | Greedy argmax or beam search (+LM) | Fast, English-only |

originContent: | TDT | `ParakeetTDT` | LSTM + duration prediction, greedy or beam search (+LM) | Better accuracy than RNNT |
translatedContent: | TDT | `ParakeetTDT` | LSTM + duration prediction, greedy or beam search (+LM) | Better accuracy than RNNT |

originContent: | TDT-CTC | `ParakeetTDTCTC` | Both TDT and CTC heads | Switch decoder at inference |
translatedContent: | TDT-CTC | `ParakeetTDTCTC` | Both TDT and CTC heads | Switch decoder at inference |

originContent: Built on a cache-aware streaming FastConformer encoder with causal convolutions and bounded-context attention:
translatedContent: Built on a cache-aware streaming FastConformer encoder with causal convolutions and bounded-context attention:

originContent: | Nemotron | `ParakeetNemotron` | Streaming TDT | Configurable latency streaming |
translatedContent: | Nemotron | `ParakeetNemotron` | Streaming TDT | Configurable latency streaming |

originContent: | Sortformer | `Sortformer` | NEST encoder → Transformer → sigmoid | Speaker diarization (up to 4 speakers) |
translatedContent: | Sortformer | `Sortformer` | NEST encoder → Transformer → sigmoid | Speaker diarization (up to 4 speakers) |

originContent: Measured on Apple M3 16GB with simulated audio input (`Tensor::randn`). Times are per-encoder-forward-pass (Sortformer: full forward pass).
translatedContent: Measured on Apple M3 16GB with simulated audio input (`Tensor::randn`). Times are per-encoder-forward-pass (Sortformer: full forward pass).

originContent: | Model | Params | CPU (ms) | GPU (ms) | GPU Speedup |
translatedContent: | Model | Params | CPU (ms) | GPU (ms) | GPU Speedup |

originContent: GPU acceleration powered by axiom's Metal graph compiler which fuses the full encoder into optimized MPSGraph operations.
translatedContent: GPU acceleration powered by axiom's Metal graph compiler which fuses the full encoder into optimized MPSGraph operations.
